## Summary

Describe the policy or integration change and why it is needed.

## Integration checklist

- [ ] API contract is linked, versioned, and response types are generated from or validated against it.
- [ ] Required Storybook/MSW states are covered and match the current contract version.
- [ ] Authentication, authorization, and error behavior match the feature documentation.
- [ ] Accessibility behavior for async states is verified.
- [ ] Analytics and diagnostics contain only approved data.
- [ ] Omitted deliverables are marked `N/A — reason`.

## Policy impact

- [ ] No cross-feature policy change.
- [ ] `FRONTEND.md` and its changelog were updated for this cross-feature policy change.
